caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and its applications. The screen displays a complex diagram with various interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "models and methods," "model sharing," "what people do," "buying & selling," "fight club," "leadership," "how people think," "we have a problem," and "future of society." These nodes are linked by arrows, suggesting relationships and processes between them. In the center, there is an image of a 3D question mark, possibly symbolizing inquiry or the central theme of the discussion. The presenter, visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, seems to be explaining the diagram while wearing headphones, indicating that this might be part of a live webinar or online class. The overall setting suggests an educational or professional context aimed at exploring complex systems and their interactions.
